versions.version_description: Key change included, plus corrections and additions in chords and lyrics
Simplified Chords in G. Easy to learn and easy to play.
Play-along chart Includes full lyrics, intro, slash and passing chords missing from previous versions submitted.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Complete chords and lyrics / well-aligned for easy auto-scrolling / short tabs for intro and verse patterns / suggestions for playable voicings and alternative chord choices.

content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
There comes a time when we heed a certain call[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
When the world must come together as one[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
There are people dying[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh, and it's time to lend a hand to life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
The greatest gift of all[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
We can't go on pretending day by day[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
That someone, somewhere will soon make a change[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
We're all a part of God's great big family[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
And the truth[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
You know love is all we need[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
We are the world, we are the children[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
We are the ones who make a brighter day so let's start giving[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a choice we're making we're saving our own lives[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
It's true we'll make a better day just you and me[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Well, send them your heart so they know that someone cares[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
And their lives will be stronger and free[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
As God has shown us by turning stone to bread[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
And so we all must lend a helping hand[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
We are the world, we are the children[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
We are the ones who make a brighter day so let's start giving[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a choice we're making we're saving our own lives[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
It's true we'll make a better day just you and me[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
When you're down and out there seems no hope at all[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
But if you just believe there's no way we can fall[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Well, well, well, let's realize that a change can only come[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
When we[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
stand together as one[/tab]

[Chorus] (x2)
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
We are the world, we are the children[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
We are the ones who make a brighter day so let's start giving[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a choice we're making we're saving our own lives[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
It's true we'll make a better day just you and me[/tab]

[Chorus Coda] (a half step higher)
[tab]            [ch]Gb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]
We are the world, we are the children[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gb[/ch]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Db[/ch]
We are the ones who make a brighter day so let's start giving[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]                       [ch]Fm[/ch]
There's a choice we're making we're saving our own lives[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ebm[/ch]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
It's true we'll make a better day just you and me (ad lib)[/tab]
